snippet.title: Aaya Sher - Lyrical | The Paradise | Nani | Anirudh Ravichander | Srikanth Odela
snippet.description:
For more latest songs & videos, subscribe 👉 https://bit.ly/Saregama_Telugu

Presenting the first single "Aaya Sher" from 'The Paradise' starring Nani and others. Directed by Srikanth Odela. Music Composed by Anirudh Ravichander. 

Music Credits:
Aaya Sher
Album / Movie : The Paradise 
Composed by Anirudh Ravichander
Lyrics - Kasarla Shyam 
Vocals - Addula Jangireddy, Arjun Chandy

Composed, Arranged & Programmed by Anirudh Ravichander
Keyboards, Synth & Rhythm Programmed by Anirudh Ravichander
Trumpet & Flugelhorn - Rakesh MS
Chorus Arranged & Sung by Arjun Chandy
Backing Vocals - Akunoori Devaihah, Yogi Sekar, Sridhar Sena
Rhythm Produced by Kalyan
Additional Rhythm Programmed by Karthik Vamsi, Shashank Vijay
Orchestrals Programmed by IC, Dan Kriston
Additional Music Programmed By Arish
Music Advisor - Ananthakrrishnan
Creative Consultant - Sajith Satya
Session Assistant - Shivakiran

Recorded at
Albuquerque Records, Chennai. Engineered by Srinivasan M, Shivakiran S
Mixed by Vinay Sridhar & Srinivasan M at Albuquerque Records, Chennai
Mastered by Mastered by Rupendar Venkatesh at Mix Magic
Music Coordinator - Velavan B


Movie Credits:
Cast: Natural Star Nani, Sonali Kulkarni & Others.
Technical Crew:
Writer - Director: Srikanth Odela
Producer: Sudhakar Cherukuri
Banner: Slv Cinemas
Music Director: Anirudh
Dop: Ch Sai
Editor: Navin Nooli
Production Designer: Avinash Kolla
Chief Co-Director & Additional Screenplay: Vinay Sagar Jonnala
Co-Director: Hari K Chanduri
Writers: Thota Srinivas, Madhava Murthy Bojanapu, Arjuna Paturi, Vamshi Krishna Pinnika, Vasanth Masadi, Manupati Karunakar (Karna)
Dialect & Diction: Krishna Teja 
Costume Designer: Ajay Kumar J
Sound Designer: Suren G
Publicity Designer: Kabilan Chelliah
Vfx Supervisor: Naresh Yalla
Titles: Hari Krishna Y
Direction Team: Gajjala Bhaskar Reddy , Nagaraju Bramhaiha , Yashwanth Vittapu ,Madhu Sugreevu, Billakurthi, Venkata Aarush , Bhaskar Ponaboina , Uday Swaroop Kalahasti , Sai Kiran Modem , Hosakota Vamshi Krishna , Jasti Guhan Chowdary , Chaitthu Mothkuri .
Color By: Redchillies.Color
Sr. Colorist: Ken Metzker
Stills: Sridhar Chadalawada
Pro: Vamsi-Sekhar
Marketing: First Show
Co Producer : Gopi Chand Innamuri  
Ceo : Vijay Kumar Chaganti 
Executive Producer: Abinav Waddypally
Production Controller: Jetty Vinay
Production Team: Kalyan Kumar Sagiraju, Brahmam Chigurupati, 
Raghu Dronavalli , Vallibaba Akula,  Juvvaala Kartheek (Tinku) , Vinay Kollu
2nd Unit Cinematographer - Praveen Pothan
Operative Cinematographer - Ram Kumar.R
Associate Cinematographer - Dwarakesh.S, Aboorvan.A
Assistant Cinematographer - Melvin

Lyrics:
PALLAVI
Hey nee ayya jagiraa
Chal maavaadochindra
Iga jadthiyyaley | Jumbalikay aaya sher |

Hey aa daar kaa sulthaane
Maa ghar kaa saithaane
Chal shikaar jeyya | Jumbalikay aaya sher |

Pacha bottu gaayamidhi | Aaya sher |
Gunjukuney nyayamidhi | Aaya sher |
Boodidhala gadda idhi | Aaya sher |
Maatho raayabadda kadhe idhi | Aaya sher |

Jadaluro jadaluro hadaluro dhadaluro
Kodutharo thodaluro theestharo tholuro
Savaariki doruku biddaa
Sevaaley lesthayi biddaa

Pegul dheesi medala yesi
Aadutham biddaa, aadutham biddaa

CHARANAM

Aada eeda yeda joodu biddaa
Vanukay puttalinka paditheynay naa needa
Bondha pedutha maliknaina gooda
Vaani saavu raasukochina devuni kaada

Chal udukuthundhi saraa battilo maa kanta thade
| Jumbalikay aaya aaya sher |

Iga raaluthadhi bottu bottulo nee panche thade
| Jumbalikay aaya aaya sher |

Jadaluro jadaluro hadaluro dhadaluro
Kodutharo thodaluro theestharo tholuro
Savaariki doruku biddaa
Sevaaley lesthayi biddaa

Pegul dheesi medala yesi
Aadutham biddaa, aadutham biddaa

SECOND PALLAVI

Hey bari batthalunonninraa
Bar baadhey ayinonraa
Nannu peekuthava | Jumbalikay aaya sher |

Hey moldhaaram lenoniraa
Nee kanaa mondonraa
Iga peekuthava | Jumbalikay aaya sher |

Pottu pottu aakalundhi | Aaya sher |
Mettu mettu ekkuthara | Aaya sher |
Peru pathaa leynonni raa | Aaya sher |
Choosko Paradise ku addresaitha | Aaya sher |

Pottu pottu aakalundhi
Mettu mettu ekkuthara
Peru pathaa leynonni raa
Choosko Paradise ku addresaitha

Label: Saregama India Limited, A RPSG Group Company

snippet.title: 100,000 UC CRIMSON SKYBLADE M416 MAXING OUT | JONATHAN IS BACK!! | BGMI!
snippet.description:
Hey Guys, I’m Jonathan Amaral, better known as Jonathan Gaming, a professional BGMI esports athlete and streamer.

Since the start of my journey, my dedication to the game has been defined by precision, consistency, and an unstoppable grind. As an assaulter, I’ve built a reputation for clutch performances and high-impact gameplay, earning respect in the BGMI community. 

Through years of dedication, I’ve honed my skills, adapting to every challenge and evolving with the game. Whether in high-stakes tournaments or streaming for the gaming community, my focus remains the same - pushing the limits and delivering top-tier gameplay.

Redbull Athlete 🧢
BGIS 2025 Runner up 🥈
BGIS 2025 Finals MVP 👑
BMPS 2024 2nd Runner up 🥉
BGMS 2022 MVP 🏆
BGMS 2022 Runner up 🥈
BGIS 2021 Overall Top Fragger 🎯
PMWL #2 Overall Fragger 💣
PMCO Globals #4 Fragger 💣
PMPL 2020 Finals #2 Fragger 🎯
PMPL 2020 Finals Runner up 🥈
PMIS 2020 Top Fragger 🎯
PMIS 2020 India Champions 🏆
PMCO 2019 Fall Split SA Champion 🏆


 Follow Me & Stay Connected! 
📷 Instagram - @ig_jonathangaming
💬 Discord - https://discord.gg/jonathan
📺 YouTube - https://www.youtube.com/@JONATHANGAMINGYT/
🐦 Twitter - @ig_jonathan16

🎮 Join the #JonathanArmy & Be Part of the Esports Revolution! 🎮
💖 Like, Share & Subscribe for More Epic Content! 💖

#JONATHANISLIVE #JONATHANBGMI #JONATHANGAMING #ESPORTS #BGMIINDIA #GAMING #LIVESTREAM

snippet.title: Aura Of Ustaad - Lyric Video | Ustaad Bhagat Singh | Pawan Kalyan | Harish Shankar | Devi Sri Prasad
snippet.description:
Here's the Second Single #AuraOfUstaad from #UstaadBhagatSingh 🔥

#UstaadBhagatSingh GRAND RELEASE WORLDWIDE ON 26th MARCH, 2026.
#UBSOnMarch26th

Production : Mythri Movie Makers 
Movie : USTAAD BHAGAT SINGH
Cast: Pawan Kalyan, Sreeleela, RaashiiKhanna, Parthiban & Others

Technical Crew:
Written-Directed by: Harish Shankar.S
Producers: Naveen Yerneni, Ravi Shankar Yalamanchili
Music: Devi Sri Prasad
Screenplay: K Dasharath, Ramesh Reddy
Additional writing: Praveen Varma and Chandramohan.
Editing: Karthika Srinivas Production Designer: Anand Sai 
CEO: Cherry
Executive Producers: R Chandrasekhar, Dinesh Narasimhan
Creative Producer: Harish Pai
Fights : Ram Laxman, Nabakanth, Prudhvi
Marketing :  First Show 
PRO : Venu Gopal

MUSIC CREDITS 
Song: Aura Of Ustaad (Telugu)
Singers:  DSP, S. P. ABHISHEK & The Indian Choral Ensemble
Lyrics: Chandrabose

MUSICIANS:
Keyboards: Vikas Badisa, KP, Ravi Krishnan & Chaitanya   
Rhythm: Kalyan 

Choir: The Indian Choral Ensemble

Sopranos:
Alisha Mathew Thayil

snippet.title: Toxic Official Hindi Teaser | Rocking Star Yash | Geetu Mohandas | KVN | Monster Mind Creations
snippet.description:
It’s Gonna Get Crazyyyy !!!

Toxic - A Fairy Tale for Grown-Ups in cinemas worldwide on 19-03-2026 in Kannada, Hindi, Telugu, Tamil, Malayalam and English

#ToxicTheMovie #Toxic #ToxicTeaser
#DaddyIsHome #ToxicTheMovie 

CAST: Yash, Kiara Advani, Nayanthara, Huma Qureshi, Tara Sutaria and Rukmini Vasanth
 
CREW:
Director of Photography: Rajeev Ravi
Music: Ravi Basrur
Production Designer: T. P. Abid
Editor: Ujwal Kulkarni
Sound Designer: Kunal Sharma
Associate Producers: Sandeep Sadashiva, Prashant Dileep Hardikar
Action Directors: J. J. Perry, Anbariv, Kecha Khamphakdee, Amrit Singh
Art Director (Bengaluru): Mohan B. Kere
Art Director: Sandeep G. Sharma
Executive Producer: M. K. Subramanya
Kannada Dialogues: Raaghav Vinay
Directors of Choreography: Ganesh Acharya, Imran Sardhariya, A. Harsha
First Assistant Director: Rao Suhaib Khan
Script Supervisor: Doyel Hargunaney
Line Producer: Akshay Mavle
Costume Designers: Neha R. Bajaj, Saniya Sardhariya (Yash)
Hair Designer: Darshan Yewalekar
Make-up & Prosthetics: Shipra Singh Acharya
Post Production: The Post Co.
Re-recording Mixer: Sreejesh Nair
Music Producer: Ravi Basrur, Chethan Handattu, Pavan Basrur, Jagadish Venky
RBM Composing Team: Santhosh Venky, Airaa Udupi, Rohit Siddappa 
Trumpet Live: Manju Bajanthri Devara Hosapete & Team
RBM Studio Coordinators:
Shivakumar, Nagaprakash Kota, Prakash Kumar, Krishna Basrur, Vijay Basrur
DI Colorist: Jayadev Tiruveaipati
DI: Redefine
VFX: DNEG
Publicity Design: Kabilan Chelliah
Visual Promotion: Ruben Trailer House

Written by: Yash & Geetu Mohandas
Directed by: Geetu Mohandas
Produced by: KVN Productions and Monster Mind Creations

Song Credits :-
Song - Hum Jaante Hai

Todoge Mera Dil Mujhe
Barbad Karoge

Barbad Karoge

Na Chain Hame Doge

Na Dard Ki Janjir Se Aajad Karoge
Dil Phir Bhi Tumhe Dete Hain

Kya Yaad Karoge Kya Yaad Karoge

Jinda Hai Tere Pyar Se
Janam Yeh Mera Rup

Jinda Hai Tere Pyar Se
Janam Yeh Mera Rup

Dilbar Diya Hamne
Too Bund Ka Pyasa Tha

Malum Hai Khush Rehake Bhi F
Ariyad Karoge
Todoge Mera Dil Mujhe Barbad Karoge
Dil Phir Bhi Tumhe Dete Hain
Kya Yaad Karoge Kya Yaad Karoge
Kya Yaad Karoge Kya Yaad Karoge

Ek Dil Hi Nahi Sara Safar
Hamne Diya Hai
Kya Kya Na Tumhe Jane Jigar
Hamne Diya Hai
Ek Dil Hi Nahi Sara Safar
Hamne Diya Hai
Kya Kya Na Tumhe Jane Jigar
Hamne Diya Hai
Mangi Thi Kali Tumne Nagar
Hamne Diya Hai
Arman Kaa Mahal Pyar Ka
Ghar Hamne Diya Hai,
Ghar Hamne Diya Hai, Malum Hai
Malum Hai Tum Ghar
Mera Barbad Karoge
Naa Dard Ki Janjir Se Aajad Karoge

snippet.title: Subedaar - Official Trailer | Anil Kapoor, Radhikka Madan, Aditya Rawal, Mona Singh, Saurabh Shukla
snippet.description:
Prime Video India Presents
Subedaar Official Trailer 
Starring Anil Kapoor, Radhikka Madan, Saurabh Shukla, Aditya Rawal, Mona Singh and Faisal Malik
Directed by Suresh Triveni
Produced by Vikram Malhotra, Anil Kapoor, Suresh Triveni
Written by Suresh Triveni, Prajwal Chandrashekar
An Opening Image Films Production, In association with Anil Kapoor Film & Communication Network

Official Release Date - March 5, 2026 on Prime Video India

About:
Set in the Indian heartland, the powerful masala action-drama follows Subedaar Arjun Maurya as he grapples with the challenges of leading a civilian life, navigates a strained relationship with his daughter and confronts societal dysfunction. Once a soldier who fought for the nation,
Subedaar must now battle enemies within to protect his home and family.

Follow us on:
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/primevideoin/
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/PrimeVideoIN/
X: https://x.com/PrimeVideoIN

ABOUT PRIME VIDEO
Prime Video is a one-stop entertainment destination offering customers a vast collection of premium programming in one application available across several devices. On Prime Video, customers can find their favourite Indian and international original series, movies, TV shows, and more, across multiple languages – including Indian-produced Original series like Mirzapur, Farzi, Panchayat, The Family Man, Dhootha, Jubilee, Dahaad, Made in Heaven, Suzhal – The Vortex, Inspector Rishi, Poacher, Indian Police Force, Paatal Lok, Rainbow Rishta, Wedding.con; Original movies like Maja Ma, Ammu, Mast Mein Rehne Ka; popular global Originals like Citadel, The Lord of The Rings: The Rings of Power, Fallout, Reacher, The Boys, The Wheel of Time, Road House, The Idea of You; some of the biggest post-theatrical films; direct-to-service films such as Shershaah, Soorarai Pottru, Sardar Udham, Bawaal, Gehraiyaan, Jai Bhim, Jalsa, Sherni, Narappa, Sarpatta Parambarai, Kuruthi, Joji, Malik, Pippa, HOME, Sharmajee Ki Beti, and many more of such titles. Additionally, Prime Video’s video entertainment marketplace, offers customers programming from partners such as Lionsgate Play, Discovery+ Crunchyroll, BBC Player, Sony Pictures – Stream, MGM+, FanCode, Chaupal, Manorama Max, Eros Now, Hoichoi, Anime Times, to name a few, via Prime Video add-on-subscriptions, as well as the option to rent movies, regardless of whether customers have a Prime membership or not. Customers can also go behind the scenes of their favorite movies and series with exclusive X-Ray access. Prime Video is one benefit among many that provides savings, convenience, and entertainment as part of the Prime membership. For more info visit www.amazon.com/primevideo.

#subedaar #SubedaarOnPrime #anilkapoor #trailer #officialtrailer #movie #primevideoindia

Directed by Suresh Triveni
Produced by Vikram Malhotra, Anil Kapoor, Suresh Triveni
Written by Suresh Triveni, Prajwal Chandrashekar
An Opening Image Films Production, In association with Anil Kapoor Film & Communication Network

Official Release Date - March 5, 2026 on Prime Video India

About:
Set in the Indian heartland, the powerful masala action-drama follows Subedaar Arjun Maurya as he grapples with the challenges of leading a civilian life, navigates a strained relationship with his daughter and confronts societal dysfunction. Once a soldier who fought for the nation,
Subedaar must now battle enemies within to protect his home and family.

Follow us on:
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/primevideoin/
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/PrimeVideoIN/
X: https://x.com/PrimeVideoIN

ABOUT PRIME VIDEO
Prime Video is a one-stop entertainment destination offering customers a vast collection of premium programming in one application available across several devices. On Prime Video, customers can find their favourite Indian and international original series, movies, TV shows, and more, across multiple languages – including Indian-produced Original series like Mirzapur, Farzi, Panchayat, The Family Man, Dhootha, Jubilee, Dahaad, Made in Heaven, Suzhal – The Vortex, Inspector Rishi, Poacher, Indian Police Force, Paatal Lok, Rainbow Rishta, Wedding.con; Original movies like Maja Ma, Ammu, Mast Mein Rehne Ka; popular global Originals like Citadel, The Lord of The Rings: The Rings of Power, Fallout, Reacher, The Boys, The Wheel of Time, Road House, The Idea of You; some of the biggest post-theatrical films; direct-to-service films such as Shershaah, Soorarai Pottru, Sardar Udham, Bawaal, Gehraiyaan, Jai Bhim, Jalsa, Sherni, Narappa, Sarpatta Parambarai, Kuruthi, Joji, Malik, Pippa, HOME, Sharmajee Ki Beti, and many more of such titles. Additionally, Prime Video’s video entertainment marketplace, offers customers programming from partners such as Lionsgate Play, Discovery+ Crunchyroll, BBC Player, Sony Pictures – Stream, MGM+, FanCode, Chaupal, Manorama Max, Eros Now, Hoichoi, Anime Times, to name a few, via Prime Video add-on-subscriptions, as well as the option to rent movies, regardless of whether customers have a Prime membership or not. Customers can also go behind the scenes of their favorite movies and series with exclusive X-Ray access. Prime Video is one benefit among many that provides savings, convenience, and entertainment as part of the Prime membership. For more info visit www.amazon.com/primevideo.

snippet.title: Ishqa'n De Lekhe (Official Trailer) | Gurnam Bhullar | Isha Malviya | New Punjabi Movie 2026
snippet.description:
Get ready to fall in love all over again! Speed Records presents the trailer for the most-awaited Punjabi love story of 2026- "Ishqa'n De Lekhe".

Starring the sensational Gurnam Bhullar alongside the stunning Isha Malviya, this Punjabi cinema is crafted for every soul that has ever loved deeply. Directed by the talented Manvir Brar, Ishqa'n De Lekhe is set to redefine Punjabi romance on the big screen.
After delivering back-to-back blockbusters with Lekh and Surkhi Bhindi, Gurnam Bhullar returns with yet another masterpiece — and this one is nothing short of magical. This new Punjabi movie is the story that speaks the language of love & is destined to become an evergreen classic of Punjabi cinema.

Mark your calendars. Book your seats. 🗓️ Releasing in cinemas on 6th March 2026

#IshqanDeLekhe #GurnamBhullar #IshaMalviya #PunjabiMovies #PunjabiMovieTrailer #NewPunjabiMovie #SpeedRecords #PunjabiMovie2026 #UpcomingPunjabiMovies

en.title: Ishqa'n De Lekhe (Official Trailer) | Gurnam Bhullar | Isha Malviya | New Punjabi Movie 2026
en.description:
Get ready to fall in love all over again! Speed Records presents the trailer for the most-awaited Punjabi love story of 2026- "Ishqa'n De Lekhe".

Starring the sensational Gurnam Bhullar alongside the stunning Isha Malviya, this Punjabi cinema is crafted for every soul that has ever loved deeply. Directed by the talented Manvir Brar, Ishqa'n De Lekhe is set to redefine Punjabi romance on the big screen.
After delivering back-to-back blockbusters with Lekh and Surkhi Bhindi, Gurnam Bhullar returns with yet another masterpiece — and this one is nothing short of magical. This new Punjabi movie is the story that speaks the language of love & is destined to become an evergreen classic of Punjabi cinema.

Mark your calendars. Book your seats. 🗓️ Releasing in cinemas on 6th March 2026

snippet.title: New Community Event: Unleash the Duke
snippet.description:
Dragon Duke needs to be freed, and he’s counting on all of you.

Starting tomorrow, jump into the Unleash the Duke Community Event, available in-game.

Navigate the dungeon, complete objectives, and choose one of the three new doors every day - each hiding different rewards. Push all the way to the final door, and everyone will unlock the Dragon Statue.

Free the Duke!
_______

Follow us on our Socials!
Twitter ► https://twitter.com/ClashofClans/
Instagram ► https://www.instagram.com/clashofclans 
Facebook ► https://www.facebook.com/ClashofClans 
TikTok ► https://www.tiktok.com/@clashofclans

Attack. Defend. Strategize. Download for free for mobile devices. supr.cl/PlayClashOfClans

From rage-­filled Barbarians with glorious mustaches to pyromaniac wizards, raise your own army and lead your clan to victory! Build your village to fend off raiders, battle against millions of players worldwide, and forge a powerful clan with others to destroy enemy clans.
PLEASE NOTE! Clash of Clans is free to download and play, however some game items can also be purchased for real money 

Also, under our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy, you must be at least 13 years of age to play or download Clash of Clans.
A network connection is also required.

FEATURES
- Build your village into an unbeatable fortress 
- Raise your own army of Barbarians, Archers, Hog Riders, Wizards, Dragons and other mighty fighters
- Battle with players worldwide and take their Trophies
- Join together with other players to form the ultimate Clan
- Fight against rival Clans in epic Clan Wars 
- Build 18 unique units with multiple levels of upgrades
- Discover your favorite attacking army from countless combinations of troops, spells, Heroes and Clan reinforcements 
- Defend your village with a multitude of Cannons, Towers, Mortars, Bombs, Traps and Walls
- Fight against the Goblin King in a campaign through the realm

Chief, are you having problems? Visit https://help.supercellsupport.com/clash-of-clans/en/

Privacy Policy:
https://supercell.com/en/privacy-policy/

Terms of Service:
https://supercell.com/en/terms-of-service/

Parent’s Guide:
https://supercell.com/en/parents/

#clashofclans

snippet.title: [Hindi] BGIS 2026 | ROUND 4 | Day 4
snippet.description:
Round 4 of BGIS 2026 is underway, and the path to the Quarterfinals begins here.

With qualification on the line, every match becomes a test of composure, adaptability, and decision-making. Teams are pushing harder, knowing that consistency and crucial moments will decide who moves forward. Expect high-pressure battles, decisive plays, and gameplay shaped by the stakes of the stage. This is where the race tightens and the journey to the Quarterfinals takes form.

Tune in live and stay connected as BGIS 2026 continues.

Follow us on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/kraftonindiaesports/
Follow us on X: https://x.com/KIEOFFICIAL_

snippet.title: WAD DAW |OFFICIAL TRAILER | KHASI FILM | SAM,RIMIKA,JAY |YN PYLLAIT HA BIJOU CINEMA HA 27th FEB 2026
snippet.description:
La mana ban thep biang ne upload ia kane ka music video Wat Krenkai ha kino kino ki social media khlem ka jingbit na ngi ki train North East Cloud Production & Chwa Syiemlieh Production.
Un-authorized re-uploading of this video Wat krenkai is strictly prohibited without the consent of the owner North East Cloud Production with Chwa Syiemlieh Production.
Official Trailer : Wad Daw - Khasi Film
Releasing on 27th February 2026 at Bijou Cinema Khyndailad Shillong
Time: 11:00AM, 1:00PM, 3:00PM,5:00PM, 7:00PM & 9:00PM
Starring: Pyllaitmitre Lypon & Rimika Dkhar, Jay Synrem, Dominic Syiem, Banlum Nongkhlaw, Banatimon Mawlong, Bahun Nongneng, Johny Suchiang, Surjyal Basumatary, Abundant Khlem, Bashan Khonghat.
Singer- Arman Disiar & Ibanpyntngen Kurbah
English sub-title: Banshem Tham
Document for apply CBFC Guwahati: Banshem Tham
D.O.P: Amos Suting
Director: Section Syiemlieh
Lyrics writer: Section Syiemlieh
Producer: Eden Ryntathiang
Make Up- Pynhunlang Rynjah
Ban Nongrum Music
Post Production: Amos Suting Studio
Choreographer: Wanbet Shangpliang
Production House:
North East Cloud Production collaboration with Chwa Syiemlieh Film Production
Spokeperson: Larikynti Lyngdoh & Urmila Kharmalki
Synopsis: Ka khana jong ka phlim “Wad Daw” ka dei shaphang uwei u samla pule (Sam) uba dei u khun jong u malik dewiong hynrei namar ba u kpa um lah siew shuh ia ka pisa ba u shim ram hadien ba la shah khang dewiong, u la shah siat iap bad la ka kmie bad dei hangne u Sam u sdang ban wad ia ka daw.
..........................................................
Yn ai khusnam ruh ia kiba kloi ban wan ienglain ha Bijou cinema ha ka show ba 11:00 baje mynstep jong ka 27 tarik February 2026 bad ka por plie ia ka jingkhang jong ka cinema ka dei ha ka por 10:00 baje mynstep.
Ia ki nongjop yn ai khusnam la ka jong kynthei bad shynrang kine ki long
1st Prize- Rs.1000, 2nd prize-Rs.500, 3rd Prize-Rs.300.

snippet.title: 1 Hour Nonstop मेरे तन में भी राम मेरे मन में भी राम | Ram Naam Jap | Powerful Ram Bhajan
snippet.description:
#ramdhun #hindibhajan #rambhajan
#ramdhun #hindibhajan #rambhajan
1 Hour Nonstop मेरे तन में भी राम मेरे मन में भी राम | Ram Naam Jap | Powerful Ram Bhajan

#ramdhun #hindibhajan #rambhajan

1 Hour Nonstop Ram Dhun | मेरे तन में भी राम मेरे मन में भी राम | Ram Naam Jap | Powerful Ram Bhajan

Song: 1 Hour Nonstop Ram Dhun | मेरे तन में भी राम मेरे मन में भी राम | Ram Naam Jap | Powerful Ram Bhajan

Presenting this beautiful and peaceful Ram Dhun to fill your mind with positive energy and devotion to Lord Ram.

यह हृदय को छूने वाला भजन *"मेरे तन में भी राम मेरे मन में भी राम" आपके जीवन के सभी कष्टों को दूर करेगा। इस **नॉनस्टॉप राम नाम जाप को सुनकर सुबह की शुरुआत करें या रात को शांति प्राप्त करें।

Lyrics - 

मेरे तन में भी राम, मेरे मन में भी राम
मेरे कण कण में राम, मेरे मन मन में राम
रोम रोम में समाया तेरा नाम रे

snippet.description:
Your favourite YouTube couple is back with one of our most highly anticipated Kannada Trailer reactions yet! This time, we're checking out the Teaser Trailer for one of South India's biggest Action-Dramas—TOXIC—featuring Yash and Kiara Advani! With all the hype surrounding this teaser, we had to check it out and see if it truly lives up to its legendary status!

We'll be sharing our genuine first-time reactions, unfiltered commentary, and definitely some jaw-dropping moments as we react to this action-packed Kannada movie trailer:

1- TOXIC Official Teaser Trailer -
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=LYK5ETKbODE

Will this Kannada blockbuster trailer blow us away? Or will it leave us disappointed? There's only one way to find out...

snippet.title: Weltify Pro Clash Season 2 | Semi Finals Day 1 | #godlike #gdr #rntx #orangutan  #8bit #getweltified
snippet.description:
Welcome to WELTIFY PRO CLASH SEASON 2 (WPCS2) — one of India’s biggest competitive BGMI esports tournaments.

🏆 STAGE: Semi Finals – Day 1
📅 DATE: 23rd February 2026
⏰ TIME: 5:00 PM onwards
📍 FORMAT: Online

MATCH MAP ORDER
🔹 A x B Erangel
🔹A x B Miramar
🔹A x C Erangel
🔹A x C Miramar
🔹B x C Erangel
🔹B x C Miramar

GROUP A
Hero Xtreme GodLike, Victores Sumus, NoNx Esports, Vasista Esports, Welt Esports, White Walkers, Team Alpha, Riotnationz
GROUP B
iQOO Revenant X Spark, iQOO 8Bit, Genesis Esports, Team LEFP, Vanguard Esports, LHS Esports, EMZ Esports, Myth Esports
GROUP C
iQOO Orangutan, OnePlus Gods Reign, Meta Ninza, 4TR Official, Rising Esports, Team H4K, AutoBotz Esports, Gods 4 Reason

Welt Esports is a competitive gaming organization dedicated to excellence, innovation, and community within the global esports scene. Founded with a passion for gaming and a commitment to growth, Welt Esports brings together top-tier talent, strategic minds, and a shared vision to dominate the digital battlefield.

Specializing in titles such as Bgmi,Clash Royale,Free Fire,Valorant and Fortnite, our teams are known for their tactical precision, relentless grind, and dynamic playstyles. We focus not only on winning, but on creating a culture where players can thrive—both in and out of the game.

Welt Esports is more than just a team; it's a movement. Our organization is built on the belief that esports is a legitimate and powerful force in entertainment, capable of inspiring, connecting, and pushing boundaries. We support our players with elite coaching, mental performance resources, and cutting-edge training environments.

Whether we’re lighting up the main stage or growing our fanbase online, Welt Esports stands for passion, perseverance, and performance. As we continue to rise, we invite gamers, fans, and partners to be a part of our journey—to create, compete, and conquer together under one banner: Welt.

#Thrist For Gamers! 
#getweltified

snippet.description:
Franklin Finally Build World's Longest GOLDEN BIKE😱 For Shinchan in GTA 5 in Telugu
#gta5 #shinchangta5 #gta5longestbike #gta5billionaire

snippet.title: Toxic Movie Teaser Review In Kannada by Amar Prasad | Rocking Star Yash | Masth Magaa
snippet.description:
The highly anticipated teaser for Rocking Star Yash's upcoming magnum opus, "Toxic," directed by Geetu Mohandas, is finally out and making massive waves across the internet! In this exclusive video, Amar Prasad breaks down the complete teaser frame-by-frame to uncover the ultimate secrets behind the visuals.

What are the hidden details you might have missed? What is the core theme of this grand project? We dive deep into Yash's intense new avatar, the brilliant cinematography, and the captivating background score. 

Watch the full video to understand the complete breakdown and analysis of the Toxic teaser. Let us know your favorite moment from the teaser in the comments below!

ರಾಕಿಂಗ್ ಸ್ಟಾರ್ ಯಶ್ ಅಭಿನಯದ ಬಹುನಿರೀಕ್ಷಿತ 'ಟಾಕ್ಸಿಕ್' (Toxic) ಸಿನಿಮಾದ ಟೀಸರ್ ಬಿಡುಗಡೆಯಾಗಿದ್ದು, ಇಂಟರ್ನೆಟ್ ನಲ್ಲಿ ಸಂಚಲನ ಸೃಷ್ಟಿಸುತ್ತಿದೆ. ಗೀತು ಮೋಹನ್ ದಾಸ್ ನಿರ್ದೇಶನದ ಈ ಮೆಗಾ ಪ್ರಾಜೆಕ್ಟ್ ನ ಟೀಸರ್ ನಲ್ಲಿ ಅಡಗಿರುವ ಡೀಟೇಲ್ಸ್ ಗಳೇನು? ಯಶ್ ಅವರ ಹೊಸ ಅವತಾರ ಹೇಗಿದೆ? ಈ ಸಿನಿಮಾದ ಕಥೆಯ ಹಿನ್ನೆಲೆ ಏನು ಅನ್ನೋದರ ಸಂಪೂರ್ಣ ವಿಶ್ಲೇಷಣೆಯನ್ನು ಅಮರ್ ಪ್ರಸಾದ್ ಅವರು ಈ ವಿಡಿಯೋದಲ್ಲಿ ನಿಮ್ಮ ಮುಂದಿಡುತ್ತಿದ್ದಾರೆ. 

ಟೀಸರ್ ನ ಪ್ರತಿಯೊಂದು ಫ್ರೇಮ್ ನಲ್ಲಿರುವ ವಿಶೇಷತೆಗಳು ಮತ್ತು ಮುಂದಿನ ನಿರೀಕ್ಷೆಗಳ ಬಗ್ಗೆ ತಿಳಿಯಲು ವಿಡಿಯೋವನ್ನು ಕೊನೆಯವರೆಗೂ ನೋಡಿ. ನಿಮ್ಮ ಅನಿಸಿಕೆಗಳನ್ನು ಕಮೆಂಟ್ ಮಾಡಿ!

------

Youtube: https://www.youtube.com/@UCBusXcy2hNAP_cIP0fCOf_w 
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/masthmagaa_com
.
.

ರಾಕಿಂಗ್ ಸ್ಟಾರ್ ಯಶ್ ಅಭಿನಯದ ಬಹುನಿರೀಕ್ಷಿತ 'ಟಾಕ್ಸಿಕ್' (Toxic) ಸಿನಿಮಾದ ಟೀಸರ್ ಬಿಡುಗಡೆಯಾಗಿದ್ದು, ಇಂಟರ್ನೆಟ್ ನಲ್ಲಿ ಸಂಚಲನ ಸೃಷ್ಟಿಸುತ್ತಿದೆ. ಗೀತು ಮೋಹನ್ ದಾಸ್ ನಿರ್ದೇಶನದ ಈ ಮೆಗಾ ಪ್ರಾಜೆಕ್ಟ್ ನ ಟೀಸರ್ ನಲ್ಲಿ ಅಡಗಿರುವ ಡೀಟೇಲ್ಸ್ ಗಳೇನು? ಯಶ್ ಅವರ ಹೊಸ ಅವತಾರ ಹೇಗಿದೆ? ಈ ಸಿನಿಮಾದ ಕಥೆಯ ಹಿನ್ನೆಲೆ ಏನು ಅನ್ನೋದರ ಸಂಪೂರ್ಣ ವಿಶ್ಲೇಷಣೆಯನ್ನು ಅಮರ್ ಪ್ರಸಾದ್ ಅವರು ಈ ವಿಡಿಯೋದಲ್ಲಿ ನಿಮ್ಮ ಮುಂದಿಡುತ್ತಿದ್ದಾರೆ. 

ಟೀಸರ್ ನ ಪ್ರತಿಯೊಂದು ಫ್ರೇಮ್ ನಲ್ಲಿರುವ ವಿಶೇಷತೆಗಳು ಮತ್ತು ಮುಂದಿನ ನಿರೀಕ್ಷೆಗಳ ಬಗ್ಗೆ ತಿಳಿಯಲು ವಿಡಿಯೋವನ್ನು ಕೊನೆಯವರೆಗೂ ನೋಡಿ. ನಿಮ್ಮ ಅನಿಸಿಕೆಗಳನ್ನು ಕಮೆಂಟ್ ಮಾಡಿ!

snippet.title: हनुमान जी के भजन | Hanuman Bhajan l Balaji Bhajan 2026| Hanuman Ji ke Bhajan | Bhajan
snippet.description:
मंगलवार स्पेशल।हनुमान जी के भजन | Hanuman Bhajan l Balaji Bhajan 2026| Hanuman Ji ke Bhajan | Bhajan

तो आईए आज पावन हृदय से इस भजन द्वारा जो मांगना है मांग लीजिए।
श्याम बाबा सबकी मनोकामनांए पूर्ण करें। 🙏


⭐Song : 
हे दुःख भन्जन मारुती नंदन
जय जय जय हनुमान गुसाईं
लहर-लहर लहराए रे झंडा 
मंगलवार तेरा है शनिवार तेरा 
श्री हनुमान अमृतवाणी 
मंगलमूर्ति मारुति नंदन 
संकट मोचन हनुमान अष्टक
श्री हनुमान जी के 108 नाम
दुनिया में देव हजारों हैं बजरंगबली 
आरती कीजै हनुमान लला की
⭐Singer :Upasana Mehta
⭐Lyrics : Traditional
⭐Music: Binny Narang (9991980610)
⭐Video: Shalini Sharma (7015960610)
⭐Label Bhakti Sadhna (9466651081)
⭐Category: Hindi Devotional (Shyam Bhajan)

hi.title: हनुमान जी के भजन | Hanuman Bhajan l Balaji Bhajan 2026| Hanuman Ji ke Bhajan | Bhajan
hi.description:
मंगलवार स्पेशल।हनुमान जी के भजन | Hanuman Bhajan l Balaji Bhajan 2026| Hanuman Ji ke Bhajan | Bhajan

तो आईए आज पावन हृदय से इस भजन द्वारा जो मांगना है मांग लीजिए।
श्याम बाबा सबकी मनोकामनांए पूर्ण करें। 🙏


⭐Song : 
हे दुःख भन्जन मारुती नंदन
जय जय जय हनुमान गुसाईं
लहर-लहर लहराए रे झंडा 
मंगलवार तेरा है शनिवार तेरा 
श्री हनुमान अमृतवाणी 
मंगलमूर्ति मारुति नंदन 
संकट मोचन हनुमान अष्टक
श्री हनुमान जी के 108 नाम
दुनिया में देव हजारों हैं बजरंगबली 
आरती कीजै हनुमान लला की
⭐Singer :Upasana Mehta
⭐Lyrics : Traditional
⭐Music: Binny Narang (9991980610)
⭐Video: Shalini Sharma (7015960610)
⭐Label Bhakti Sadhna (9466651081)
⭐Category: Hindi Devotional (Shyam Bhajan)

snippet.title: 1 Hour Nonstop मेरे तन में भी राम मेरे मन में भी राम Ram Naam Jap Powerful Ram Bhajan #bhajan
snippet.description:
#ramdhun #ramnaam #rambhajan
1 Hour Nonstop Ram Dhun | मेरे तन में भी राम मेरे मन में भी राम | Ram Naam Jap | Powerful Ram Bhajan

Song: 1 Hour Nonstop Ram Dhun | मेरे तन में भी राम मेरे मन में भी राम | Ram Naam Jap | Powerful Ram Bhajan
Lyrics, Music & Composer:  Kuldeep Mahar
Singer : Sagar Bedardi
Editing: Lala Mothiyapura
Music Label : Lok Rasiya Studio

Presenting this beautiful and peaceful Ram Dhun to fill your mind with positive energy and devotion to Lord Ram.

यह हृदय को छूने वाला भजन *"मेरे तन में भी राम मेरे मन में भी राम" आपके जीवन के सभी कष्टों को दूर करेगा। इस **नॉनस्टॉप राम नाम जाप को सुनकर सुबह की शुरुआत करें या रात को शांति प्राप्त करें।

Lyrics - 

मेरे तन में भी राम, मेरे मन में भी राम
मेरे कण कण में राम, मेरे मन मन में राम
रोम रोम में समाया तेरा नाम रे
हाय मेरी साँसों में तेरा ही नाम रे
हाय मेरी साँसों में तेरा ही नाम रे

जैसे चंदा में राम, जैसे सूरज में राम
जैसे चंदा में राम, जैसे सूरज में राम
अंबर तारों में समाया तेरा नाम रे
हाय मेरी साँसों में तेरा ही नाम रे
हाय मेरी साँसों में तेरा ही नाम रे

जैसे सीता के राम, जैसे राधा के श्याम
जैसे सीता के राम, जैसे राधा के श्याम
नर नारी में समाया तेरा नाम रे
हाय मेरी साँसों में तेरा ही नाम रे
हाय मेरी साँसों में तेरा ही नाम रे

जैसे शबरी के राम, जैसे मीरा के श्याम
जैसे शबरी के राम, जैसे मीरा के श्याम
पत्ते पत्ते में समाया तेरा नाम रे
हाय मेरी साँसों में तेरा ही नाम रे
हाय मेरी साँसों में तेरा ही नाम रे




Nonstop Ram Dhun Continuous chanting for high focus and meditation.
Ram Naam Jap Best way to purify your thoughts.
Mere Tan Mein Bhi Ram Mere Mann Mein Bhi Ram The powerful lyric that inspires devotion.
Ram Siya Ram The ultimate mantra for peace and happiness.

📌 Keywords: Ram Dhun 2025, Ram Naam Jap Bhajan, मेरे तन में भी राम मेरे मन में भी राम, Shri Ram Bhajan, Ram Devotional Song, Ram Mantra Jap, Ram Naam Stotra, Shri Ram Ka Bhajan, Bajao Bhakti, 1 Hour Ram Dhun, Nonstop Ram Dhun

snippet.title: तुम्हारी नज़रों में हमने देखा | Kal Ki Awaz | Asha Bhosle | Kumar Sanu Songs | Pratibha Sinha
snippet.description:
हिंदी सिनेमा के सुनहरे दौर, 90 के दशक की मधुर आवाज़ें - आशा भोसले और कुमार सानू! इस वीडियो में, हम आपके लिए लेकर आए हैं फिल्म 'कल की आवाज़' का दिल छू लेने वाला गीत "तुम्हारी नज़रों में हमने देखा", जो प्यार और रोमांस की गहराईयों को छूता है। 

यह गीत न केवल एक मधुर रचना है, बल्कि यह उस दौर की यादें भी ताज़ा करता है जब संगीत में सादगी और भावनाएं कूट-कूट कर भरी होती थीं। आशा जी की आवाज़ की मिठास और कुमार सानू जी के दिलकश अंदाज़ ने इस गाने को अमर बना दिया है।

तो आइये, इस खूबसूरत गीत को सुनें और खो जाएं प्यार के रंग में। हमें कमेंट करके बताएं कि आपको यह गाना कैसा लगा और आपका पसंदीदा 90s का रोमांटिक गाना कौन सा है!



Credits :

Song: Tumhari Nazron Mein Humne Dekha
Album: Kal Ki Awaz
Artist: Asha Bhosle | Kumar Sanu
Music Director: Nadeem-Shravan
Lyricist: Sameer 


वीडियो को लाइक करें, कमेंट करें और हमारे चैनल को सब्सक्राइब करना न भूलें। आपका साथ हमें और भी बेहतर संगीत लाने के लिए प्रेरित करता है।

संगीत की यह जादू हमेशा ज़िंदा रहे…

#AshaBhosle #KumarSanu #HindiSongs #RomanticSongs #90sSongs #Bollywood #LoveSongs


#AshaBhosle #KumarSanu #HindiSongs #RomanticSongs #90sSongs #Bollywood #OldIsGold #LoveSongs #ClassicHits #TumhariNazronMeinHumneDekha #KalKiAwaz #NostalgicMelodies #EmotionalSongs #BollywoodMusic #IndianMusic #HindiLoveSongs #1990sMusic     #90      

To buy Saregama Carvaan, visit  https://sarega.ma/yt_carvn 
To buy virus free original tracks, visit  https://sarega.ma/yt_music

snippet.title: New Adivasi Song | Gulalya Haat | Bhongriya Song | Sanjay Kirade & Mahi Dawar | AVP  #adivasisong
snippet.description:
धन-धन सतगुरु । जय जोहार जय आदिवासी
Adivasi VDO Production Presents

Gulalya Haat is inspired by the vibrant Adivasi Bhangoriya Haat, where people come together to celebrate life with music, dance, colors, and joyful gatherings.
This official video beautifully captures the happiness, togetherness, and festive spirit of the traditional haat, showcasing the true essence of Adivasi culture.

🎬 Song Title
New Adivasi Song | Gulalya Haat | Bhongriya Song | Sanjay Kirade & Mahi Dawar | AVP  #adivasisong

🎥 Production Team

➤ Producer: Mukesh Solanki
➤ Director: Rohit Vaishaki (Aadiwood)
➤ Choreographer: Mayur Singh Chouhan & karan solanki
➤ Script Writer: Arjoon Solanki, Rohit Vaishaki, Anjay Barde

🌟 Featuring Artists
-Dora Dawar
-Gulatya,Vinzaa, 
-Mayur Chouhan, Priya Solanki, 
-Rupa Solanki, Ramasingh Bamane (Bahu), 
-Aruna Solanki, Ravindra Singh,
-Agesh Solanki 
- priyanka , kajal , Roshani ,

🎧 Audio Credits

➤ Singer: Sanjay Kirade, Mahi Dawar
➤ Lyrics: — Dhuriya Rawat Ma'am
➤ Recording Studio: Shanti Recording Studio, Jogwada
➤ Music: Ritesh Kirade
➤ Mix & Mastering: Ritesh Kirade
➤ Dhol Rhythm : DJ Arun More

🎞️ Post Production

➤ DOP: Pawan Bhosle
➤ Editing & Colorist: Rohit Vaishaki (Aadiwood)
➤ Graphic Designer: Mai Aadiwasi & Yuvi Graphics
➤ Channel Manager: Agesh Solanki
➤ Digital Partner: Adivasi Media 
➤ Creative Team : Chindra Wali (moni solanki )
➤ Music Label: Adivasi VDO Production (AVP)

Ankit Awaya, Ankit Solanki, Krish Solanki, Krishna Waskle, Rakesh Waskle,
Aman Waskle, Rahul Dawar, Rohit Dawar, Arpit Dawar, Vishal Solanki,
Ramlal Solanki, Kasiram Dawar, Sunil Kirade

snippet.title: Payal Ki Khanak | Hindi New Song | Anil Rawat,Kajal | Mohit,Anshu | New Dj Song 2026
snippet.description:
#payalkikhanak #golinindki #anilrawat
Payal Ki Khanak | Hindi New Song | Anil Rawat,Kajal | Mohit,Anshu | Bhaigiri Music

For Business Enquires and any other Enquires
Contact- 8959171538
email- princeyadav708090@gmail.com

Follow Me On Instagram-   / princeyadav88  

Audio Credits 
►Album: Payal Ki Khanak Se Jagege Sajna
►Song:  Payal Ki Khanak Se Jagege Sajna
►Singer: Anil Rawat & Kajal Hathrasi 
►Lyrics: Anil Rawat,Rambal Rawat 
►Music: JPS Music - 

Video credit- 
Prince Yadav
Kalpana raj
rawsahab singh bundela
rahul yadav
abhishek yadav
ginni raja
ramraja

हो कैसे आऊ मिलवे बजेंगे कंगना 
पायल की खनक से जगेंगे सजना,,

हा आवे तो आजा झूठी बात क्यों बनावे,,
दो महीना से रानी येठ क्यों दिखावे 

हा बात बनावे बैठी बैठी अंगना,,
गोली नींद की दे अइयो सो जावे संजना,,

हा करले सवर बाबू मिलने भी आऊंगी,,
प्यार की है प्यास पानी हाथ से पिलाऊंगी,,

प्यार से बडो कोई रोग हतना,,
पायल की खनक से जगेंगे सजना,,

न चहिए प्यार मोकू बारिश की बूंद को,,
छाती से लगाके देजा मौकु सकून सो,,

हा खून सो जलावे गोरी तेरा हंसना,,
गोली नींद की दे अइयो सो जाएंगे सजना,,

Ho kese aau milve bajenge kangna,,
Payal ki khanak se jagenge sajna 

Aave to aaja jhuti baat Kyo banave,,
Do mahina se rani yeth kyo dikhave,,
Ha baat banave bethi bethi angana,,
Goli need ki de aiyo so jaave sajna

Ha karle savar babu milne bhi aaungi ,,
Pyar ki hai pyas pani hath se pilaungi,,,
Pyar se bdo koi rog hath na,
Payal ki khanak se jagenge sajna,,

N chahiye pyar moku barish ki bund ko,,
Chhati se lagake deja moku sakun so,,

khoon  so jalave gori tera hasna,,
Goli need ki de aiyo so jaave sajna,,,

हो कैसे आऊ मिलवे बजेंगे कंगना 
पायल की खनक से जगेंगे सजना,,

हा आवे तो आजा झूठी बात क्यों बनावे,,
दो महीना से रानी येठ क्यों दिखावे 

हा बात बनावे बैठी बैठी अंगना,,
गोली नींद की दे अइयो सो जावे संजना,,

हा करले सवर बाबू मिलने भी आऊंगी,,
प्यार की है प्यास पानी हाथ से पिलाऊंगी,,

प्यार से बडो कोई रोग हतना,,
पायल की खनक से जगेंगे सजना,,

न चहिए प्यार मोकू बारिश की बूंद को,,
छाती से लगाके देजा मौकु सकून सो,,

हा खून सो जलावे गोरी तेरा हंसना,,
गोली नींद की दे अइयो सो जाएंगे सजना,,

Ho kese aau milve bajenge kangna,,
Payal ki khanak se jagenge sajna 

Aave to aaja jhuti baat Kyo banave,,
Do mahina se rani yeth kyo dikhave,,
Ha baat banave bethi bethi angana,,
Goli need ki de aiyo so jaave sajna

Ha karle savar babu milne bhi aaungi ,,
Pyar ki hai pyas pani hath se pilaungi,,,
Pyar se bdo koi rog hath na,
Payal ki khanak se jagenge sajna,,

N chahiye pyar moku barish ki bund ko,,
Chhati se lagake deja moku sakun so,,

khoon  so jalave gori tera hasna,,
Goli need ki de aiyo so jaave sajna,,,

snippet.title: China फिर घुसा Bharat में MODI का Counter Att@ck याद रखेगा चीन | CWSJ-3059 | Sumeet Jain
snippet.description:
China फिर घुसा Bharat में MODI का Counter Att@ck याद रखेगा चीन | CWSJ-3059 | Sumeet Jain 

The ice is cracking in the Himalayas. It is not climate change. It is military explosives.

The global chessboard was just flipped upside down. India is no longer watching from the sidelines. It is pulling the strings.

In the last 24 hours, three massive shockwaves hit the geopolitical radar. First, India entered "Pax Silica," a massive US-led tech alliance designed to entirely cut China out of the trillion-dollar semiconductor supply chain. Second, France aggressively bypassed Washington to forge a dominant AI and quantum computing pact with New Delhi. Third, the Middle East quietly transformed the IMEC trade route into a heavily fortified security axis, tying Gulf survival directly to India’s rise.

But every action has a violent reaction. Beijing is panicking.
In direct retaliation to India's tech dominance, Chinese military bulldozers are blasting through the freezing Shaksgam Valley. Commercial satellites caught them red-handed building a permanent military artery aimed straight at India’s Siachen Glacier. A two-front collusive threat with Pakistan is rapidly becoming a geographical nightmare.

The digital cold war just triggered a physical arms race at 15,000 feet. India is responding with total, uncompromising defiance, accelerating the 1,840-kilometer Arunachal Frontier Highway.

The era of a neutral India is dead. New Delhi is now the ultimate geopolitical fortress. Dive into the undeniable satellite proof, the secret digital treaties, and the ticking countdown in the mountains.
The next 30 days will dictate the new world order.

#indiageopolitics  #chinaborder  #shaksgamvalley  #semiconductorwar  #imec  #globalstrategicshift



About:

Sumeet Jain is a leading growth specialist and geopolitical analyst with a deep focus on the economic and political landscapes of China, India, and Pakistan. He combines expertise in business and personal development with sophisticated regional geopolitical analysis, providing unique and valuable perspectives.

As a corporate trainer, mentor, and author, Jain empowers individuals and organizations to achieve their potential. His coaching programs foster growth, success, and strategic business acumen.

His analysis, delivered via his YouTube channel and written works, delves into economic trends, financial markets, and political developments. He offers insightful commentary on the interplay of these factors, shaping the future of these nations. His understanding of business analytics, coupled with keen observation of political and financial shifts, allows for nuanced perspectives. He is a recognized authority, offering practical advice and informed analysis of the intricate geopolitical dynamics.

⚠️I will NEVER contact you for business or promotions (even if it comes from my legit email). I will not use IG, Telegram, or whatsapp to reach out - please ignore and report those accounts.⚠️⚠️⚠️

snippet.title: Jignesh Barot | Laganiyo (Official Video) | લાગણીયો | New Gujarati Song 2026
snippet.description:
“લાગણીયો” એક સુંદર અને દિલને સ્પર્શી જાય એવું ગીત છે, જેમાં Jignesh Barot ની મીઠી અવાજ લાગણીઓને જીવંત બનાવે છે। માત્ર @SaregamaGujarati  પર સાંભળો।

Credits:

Singer: Jignesh Barot
Producer: Red Velvet Cinema
Lyrics : Naresh Thakor Vayad
Music : Jackie Gajjar
Artist : Jignesh Barot ,Chhaya Thakor 
Co Artis: Bharti Chaudhari,Hashmukh Limbachiya 
Creative Producer: Dhyey Films & Team
Concept Director: Vishnu Thakor (Adalaj)
Cemera :Montu Rajput
Editing :The Yellow Production 
Technical Support: Jenish Talaviya
Production: Jakirbhai
Makeup &hair : Hashmukh Limbachiya
Sport Boy: Gado,lalo
Light: Kalpesh Jadhav
Sound: Sunil Kachhiya
Jignesh Barot Costume: Ekata J Barot
Recording: Sargam Music Studio Patan ( Pankaj Mistry) 
Special Thanx : J D Bapu

Lyrics:

ઓ વિધાતા રુઠી ને મારી દુભાણી સે લાગણી(૨)
લાગણીયો કેમ કરી વિહરસે રે 
હો જોડે રહેવાની મારી હતી એક માગણી 
માગણીયો કેમ કરી વિહરસે રે 
ઓ દુઃખ ભરી વેદના ની કરું કોને માગણી 
વાલભરી વાતો કોણ કરસે રે 
લાગણીયો કેમ કરી વિહરસે રે 
ઓ જોવા માગું વલખા મારું ગોરલ કયા દેખાય છે 
પગની જાજર ખખડાવે ભણકાર એવા થાય છે 
ઓ માયા લગાડી મેલી દીધો મનડું રે મુજાય છે 
જીવન ને મોત વચ્ચે જીવ જોલા ખાય છે 
ઓ વાત કરી વહાલી વરસતી રે વાંદડી 
લાગણીયો કેમ કરી વિહરસે રે (૨)
ઓ મારા પ્રેમ ને પૂજતીતી પ્રેમ પાછળ હતી ઘેલી 
મારા હાથ માં ના રહી મારા હાથે રે સાચવેલી 
ઓ જીવ કહી બોલાવતી આજે જીવ થયો દૂર 
એકલો પાડિયો આજે હું તો થઈ ગયો ગાંડોતુર રે 
ઓ જરૂર હતી જેની નથી એની હાજરી 
હાજરિયો કોણ પૂરી કરસે રે 
લાગણીયો કેમ કરી વિહરસે રે 

#laganiyo
#jigneshbarot 
#jigneshkaviraj  
#saregamagujarati

ઓ દુઃખ ભરી વેદના ની કરું કોને માગણી 
વાલભરી વાતો કોણ કરસે રે 
લાગણીયો કેમ કરી વિહરસે રે 
ઓ જોવા માગું વલખા મારું ગોરલ કયા દેખાય છે 
પગની જાજર ખખડાવે ભણકાર એવા થાય છે 
ઓ માયા લગાડી મેલી દીધો મનડું રે મુજાય છે 
જીવન ને મોત વચ્ચે જીવ જોલા ખાય છે 
ઓ વાત કરી વહાલી વરસતી રે વાંદડી 
લાગણીયો કેમ કરી વિહરસે રે (૨)
ઓ મારા પ્રેમ ને પૂજતીતી પ્રેમ પાછળ હતી ઘેલી 
મારા હાથ માં ના રહી મારા હાથે રે સાચવેલી 
ઓ જીવ કહી બોલાવતી આજે જીવ થયો દૂર 
એકલો પાડિયો આજે હું તો થઈ ગયો ગાંડોતુર રે 
ઓ જરૂર હતી જેની નથી એની હાજરી 
હાજરિયો કોણ પૂરી કરસે રે 
લાગણીયો કેમ કરી વિહરસે રે

snippet.title: Marvel's Wolverine - Release Date Reveal
snippet.description:
Become a living weapon. As he searches for answers about his past, Wolverine will do whatever it takes – unleashing brutal claw combat, violent rage, and relentless determination – to cut through the mystery of the man he used to be. 

From Insomniac Games, the developers of the critically acclaimed Marvel’s Spider-Man franchise, comes Marvel’s Wolverine, an all-new take on an iconic character based on Marvel Comics. Developed in collaboration with Marvel Games and Sony Interactive Entertainment, Marvel’s Wolverine coming to PlayStation®5 consoles September 15, 2026. 
 
©2026 MARVEL 
©2026 Sony Interactive Entertainment Inc. 
Developed by Insomniac Games, Inc.

snippet.title: Kanda Sashti Kavacham | கந்த  சஷ்டி கவசம் | தமிழ் வரிகளுடன் | Lyrics | Mahanadi Shobana
snippet.description:
🙏 Kandha Sashti Kavasam with Tamil & English Lyrics - A powerful Tamil hymn dedicated to Lord Murugan, believed to offer divine protection, strength, and spiritual upliftment.

🎤 Sung soulfully by Mahanadhi Shobana, this is the original full-length version that brings peace and courage to all devotees.

🕉️ Listen Kanda Sashi Kavasam daily for positivity, victory over obstacles, and divine blessings from Vel Muruga.

🎧 Audio Credits:
• Singer: Mahanadhi Shobana
• Lyrics: Sri Devaraya Swamigal
• Category: Devotional / Murugan / Tamil Hymns

🕉️ கந்த சஷ்டி கவசம் – தமிழில் மிகவும் புகழ்பெற்ற பக்தி பாடல். முருகப்பெருமானின் அருளைப் பெற தினமும் கேட்கத்தக்க திருப்பாடல்.
🎤 இந்த முழுமையான பதிப்பை மகாநதி ஷோபனா அவர்கள் இதமான குரலில் பாடியுள்ளார்.

📌 பாடியவர்: மகாநதி ஷோபனா
✍️ வரிகள்: ஸ்ரீ தேவராய சுவாமிகள்
🎼 வகை: முருக பக்தி / கவசம் / தமிழ் தேவார பாடல்கள்

🙏 வேல் முருகனின் அருளும் காப்பும் உங்களுடன் எப்போதும் இருப்பதாக அருள்வாயாக!

#KandaSashtiKavacham #MuruganSongs #MahanadhiShobana #TamilDevotional #VelMuruga #BhaktiSongs #MuruganBhakti #kavacham

snippet.title: Ek Jawani Teri Ek Jawani Meri  - 8K | Kachche Dhaage | Alka Yagnik, Kumar Sanu | 90's Romantic Song
snippet.description:
Enjoy the beautiful 90’s romantic song “Ek Jawani Teri Ek Jawani Meri” from the movie Kachche Dhaage in stunning 8K quality 🎶

Starring Saif Ali Khan and Namrata Shirodkar, this song is full of love, youth, and classic 90s charm.
Sung by Alka Yagnik and Kumar Sanu, this track is one of the evergreen romantic hits of the 90s.

Stay updated with the latest videos from Tips Official, Subscribe on the below link.
http://youtube.com/tipsofficial

Song Credits :
Singer(s): Alka Yagnik, Kumar Sanu
Music Director: Nusrat Fateh Ali Khan
Lyricist: Anand Bakshi

Movie Cast & Crew:
Producer: Tips Films
Director: Milan Luthria
Cast: Ajay Devgan, Saif Ali Khan, Namrata Shirodkar, Manisha Koirala, Bunty Luthria

Song Lyrics:

La La La La La La La La
La La La La
Ek Jawani Teri Ek Jawani Meri
Dono Mile To Bane Prem Kahani
Ek Jawani Teri Ek Jawani Meri
Dono Mile To Bane Prem Kahani
Bujh Jaye Dil Ki Ye Aag
Bujh Jaye Dil Ki Ye Aag
Aag Pe Ab Ke Baras To Baras Jaye Pani
Ek Jawani Teri Ek Jawani Meri
Dono Mile To Bane
Prem Kahani Prem Kahani

Zulfe Meri Ulza De Tu
Kajal Mera Bikhara De Tu
Tujhko Ijazat He Ye
Zalim Mohabbat Hai Ye
Sharm Bahut Aati Hai Mujhe
Par Tujse Mein Kya Sharmaoo
Mera Nahi Isme Dosh
Hosh Nahi Mujhko Mein Ho Gayi Teri Deewani
Ek Jawani Teri Ek Jawani Meri
Dono Mile Toh Bane Prem Kahani Prem Kahani

Chahe Mujhe Jala De Tu
Dil Ki Lagi Bujha De Tu
Aisa Sama Aa Gaya
Lab Pe Dhoova Aa Gaya
Chukar Mujhko Dekha Zara
Sabanam Me Hai Kitane Shole
Hone Laga Dil Ke Aar Par
Ye Dard Naya He Par Chot Purani
Ek Jawani Teri Ek Jawani Meri
Dono Mile Toh Bane
Prem Kahani Prem Kahani

snippet.title: శ్రీ హనుమాన్ భక్తి పాటలు | Anjaneya Swamy Songs | Lord Hanuman Telugu  Bhakti Songs
snippet.description:
శ్రీ హనుమాన్ భక్తి పాటలు | Anjaneya Swamy Songs | Lord Hanuman Telugu  Bhakti Songs   


Experience the divine strength and blessings of Hanuman through these powerful Telugu devotional songs 🙏

This video features Sri Hanuman Bhakti Songs and soulful Anjaneya Swamy Songs that inspire devotion, courage, and spiritual confidence. Lord Hanuman, the symbol of unwavering faith and strength, protects devotees from fear, negativity, and obstacles while granting success and inner peace.

Listening to Hanuman bhakti songs daily — especially on Tuesdays and Saturdays — is believed to bring divine protection, positive energy, and spiritual growth. 


HanumanBhaktiSongs #AnjaneyaSwamy #LordHanuman #HanumanSongsTelugu #SriHanuman #TeluguDevotionalSongs #TuesdaySpecialSongs

জয়গুরু, নমস্কার, আপনাদের আর্শিবাদ ও যে সমস্ত শিল্পী,লেখক,সুরকার ও অভিনয় করেন।  গ্রাম বাংলা থেকে তাদের প্রতিভা প্রকাশ করার সুযোগ পায়না তাদের অল্প খরচে যাতে তাদের প্রতিভা মানুষের কাছে পৌছে দিতে পারে, তাই আমাদের এস,এম,ফোক চ্যানেল। এই চ্যানেলের ভি ডি ও তে  খরচ করে যে টুকু আয়  হয় তাই দিয়ে সহজ মানুষ সেবাশ্রমে মানুষের সেবা করা হয়। তাই সকলের কাছে অনুরোধ SM Folk YouTube চ্যানেলের পাশে ও সাথে থেকে  সাহায্য করুন। জয়গুরু।।#PuruliaSong #PuruliaStatus

snippet.title: Franklin & Shinchan Nomb Challenge 🌙😭 | Ramadan Special GTA 5 Malayalam
snippet.description:
Franklin & Shinchan take on the ultimate Nomb Challenge in this Ramadan Special GTA 5 Malayalam episode! 🌙😭

Can Shinchan survive a full day of fasting? Will Franklin protect everyone when trouble begins during Ramadan?

This emotional and action-packed GTA 5 Malayalam video shows the true meaning of Nomb — patience, self-control, and helping the needy. But when villains try to create chaos before Iftar, Franklin steps in for a mass fight!

Watch till the end for a heart-touching Ramadan moment and sunset Iftar scene ❤️

🌙 Ramadan Special Episode
🔥 Action + Emotion + Comedy
🎮 GTA 5 Malayalam Roleplay

Don’t forget to Like, Share & Subscribe for more Franklin & Shinchan GTA 5 Malayalam videos!

#GTAV #GTA5Malayalam #RamadanSpecial #Shinchan #Franklin #NombChallenge

snippet.title: हैप्पी होली बाबू | Saurabh Royale & Shivani Singh | Sachin Manisha Raj | Amit Kitto | Holi Song 2026
snippet.description:
UBT Music Bhojpuri Presents   🎨 HAPPY HOLI BABU 🎨  

इस होली आ रहा है प्यार, रंग और बाबू वाला अंदाज़ 💛🌈  
"HAPPY HOLI BABU" एक रोमांटिक और मस्ती से भरा नया भोजपुरी होली गाना है, 
जिसे गाया है Saurabh Royale और Shivani Singh ने।

ये गाना खास तौर पर कपल्स, पति-पत्नी और बाबू-सोना वाली फीलिंग को ध्यान में रखकर बनाया गया है।इस होली इस गाने के साथ मनाइए प्यार और रंगों का त्योहार ❤️🎶

snippet.title: Naane Neenanthe 8K Video Song | BRAT | Darling Krishna | Manisha | AJ | Shashank
snippet.description:
Presenting The Naane Neenanthe 8K Video Song From The Movie “BRAT ” Starring : Darling Krishna, Manisha, Achyuth Kumar, Ramesh Indira, Dragon Manju & Others Exclusive Only On Anand Audio Kannada Youtube Channel..!!! 
------------------
The trio of Chartbuster JAGAVE NEENU GELATHIYE, Shashank X Sid Sriram X Arjun Janya are back with Another Soulful Stunner!" 
-------------------
To Listen On Your Favourite Music Streaming Platform
♪ Jiosaavn - https://www.jiosaavn.com/song/naane-neenanthe-from-brat/RjgzdT4FeQQ
♪ Spotify - https://open.spotify.com/track/4S8oIZNUK40qjTOzx4M32R
♪ Amazon - https://music.amazon.in/albums/B0FJTT9G51
♪ Apple Music - https://music.apple.com/in/song/naane-neenanthe-from-brat/1828710534
♪ Youtube Music & Shorts : https://music.youtube.com/watch?v=RjRYOELTDgo
♪ Gaana Music : https://gaana.com/song/naane-neenanthe
♪ Insta Reels - https://www.instagram.com/reels/audio/605866648903369/
♪ Josh - https://share.myjosh.in/audio/2a343850-2ce9-4046-9260-14b94478dd5b
-----------------
Song: Naane Neenanthe
Lyrics- Shashank

Pallavi: 
ನಾನೇ- ನೀನಂತೆ ನೀನಂತೆ 
ನೀನೇ- ನಾನಂತೆ ನಾನಂತೆ 
ಜೀವಾ..ಒಂದೇನೆ,ಹೃದಯ ಎರಡು 

ನಮ್ಮ- ನಡುವೆ ಬರಲಿ ನೂರು- ಮುನಿಸು ಜಗಳ 
ಹಾಗೆ.. ಇರಲಿ ಪ್ರೀತಿ ಸೊಗಡು

ಜೊತೆಯಲಿ ನೀನಿದ್ದರೆ ಎದೆಯಲಿ ಸಡಗರ 
ನಿನ್ನ ನಗು ಎಲ್ಲದಕ್ಕೂ ಪರಿಹಾರ

ನನ್ನಯ ನಾಳೆ- ನಿನ್ನಯ ಪಾಲೆ ನನ್ನಾ ಬದುಕೆ ನಿನ್ನದು ಗೆಳತಿ.

ಕಾಯುವೆ ನಾನು- ರೆಪ್ಪೆಯ ಹಾಗೆ  ಜನುಮ ಪೂರಾ ನಿನ್ನನ್ನೇ..
ಕೋರುವೆ ನಿನ್ನ- ಗಾಳಿಯ ಹಾಗೆ  ಉಸಿರು ಇರೋ ತನಕಾನೆ..
ಚರಣ: 1:
ಬದುಕಿನ ಕೊರತೆಯನು ತುಂಬಿಂದ ನಾಯಕಿಯೇ 
ನಿನ್ನದೆ ಮುನ್ನುಡಿಯೇ ನಲ್ಮೆಯ ಬಾಳಿಗೆ..

ಮನಸಿನ ಮಹಡಿಯಲಿ ನಿನ್ನದೇ ಮುಗುಳುನಗೆ 
ಕನಸಿನ ದಾರಿಯಲಿ ನಿನ್ನದೇ ದೀವಿಗೆ 

ನಿನ್ನ ಒಲವಾ ಕರೆಗೆ ಕೊಡುವೆ ಪೂರ್ತಿ ಸಮಯಾ 
ನನ್ನ ಕೊರಳಾ ಬಳಸಿ ಹೇಳು ಎಲ್ಲಾ ವಿಷಯಾ 

ನನ್ನಯ ಕೋಪ ನನ್ನಯ ತಾಳ್ಮೆ ಎಲ್ಲಾ ನಿನ್ನಯ ವಶವೇ ಗೆಳತಿ..

II ಕಾಯುವೆ ನಾನು II 
ಚರಣ: 2 (FEMALE)
ನೀನು ಹತ್ತಿರ.. ಇದ್ದರೂ.. ಹುಡುಕುವೆ ನಿನ್ನನೇ..
ಅಂತ ಪರಿ ಸೆಳೆತ ನೀನು ಇನಿಯ..

ನಿನ್ನ ಬದಲು, ಬೇರೇನು, ಸಿಕ್ಕರೂನು ಒಪ್ಪೆನೂ 
ನೀನೇ ನನ್ನ- ನಾಡಿಮಿಡಿತ ಗೆಳೆಯಾ..
M: ಕಡಲ ಅಲೆಯಾ ಹಾಗೆ, ನೀನು ನನ್ನ ಒಳಗೆ..
F: ರಾತ್ರಿ ಸುರಿದಾ ಮಳೆಯ ಸೊಬಗು ನೀನು ನನಗೆ
M: ನೋವಿಗೆ ಮದ್ದು- ನಿನ್ನಯ ಸ್ಪರ್ಶ.. ನಿನ್ನಾ ನೆನಪೇ ನನಗೆ ಹರುಷ 
F: ಸೋಲುವೆ ನಿನ್ನ- ಪ್ರೀತಿಯ ಮುಂದೆ, ಇಡದೆ ಯಾವ ಲೆಕ್ಕಾನೆ 
F: ದೇವರ ಮುಂದೆ- ಬೇಡುವೆ ನಾನು.. ಏಳೇಳು ಜನುಮ, ನಿನ್ನನ್ನೇ..
II ನಾನೇ II 
......................
♪ Movie: BRAT
♪ Banner: Dolphin Entertainment 
♪ Producer: Manjunath V. Kandkur
♪ Director: Shashank
♪ Song Title: Naane Neenanthe
♪ Music: Arjun Janya
♪ Singers: Sid Sriram | Lahari Mahesh
♪ Lyricist: Shashank
♪ DOP: Abhilash Kalathi

ನಮ್ಮ- ನಡುವೆ ಬರಲಿ ನೂರು- ಮುನಿಸು ಜಗಳ 
ಹಾಗೆ.. ಇರಲಿ ಪ್ರೀತಿ ಸೊಗಡು

ಜೊತೆಯಲಿ ನೀನಿದ್ದರೆ ಎದೆಯಲಿ ಸಡಗರ 
ನಿನ್ನ ನಗು ಎಲ್ಲದಕ್ಕೂ ಪರಿಹಾರ

ನನ್ನಯ ನಾಳೆ- ನಿನ್ನಯ ಪಾಲೆ ನನ್ನಾ ಬದುಕೆ ನಿನ್ನದು ಗೆಳತಿ.

ಕಾಯುವೆ ನಾನು- ರೆಪ್ಪೆಯ ಹಾಗೆ  ಜನುಮ ಪೂರಾ ನಿನ್ನನ್ನೇ..
ಕೋರುವೆ ನಿನ್ನ- ಗಾಳಿಯ ಹಾಗೆ  ಉಸಿರು ಇರೋ ತನಕಾನೆ..
ಚರಣ: 1:
ಬದುಕಿನ ಕೊರತೆಯನು ತುಂಬಿಂದ ನಾಯಕಿಯೇ 
ನಿನ್ನದೆ ಮುನ್ನುಡಿಯೇ ನಲ್ಮೆಯ ಬಾಳಿಗೆ..

ಮನಸಿನ ಮಹಡಿಯಲಿ ನಿನ್ನದೇ ಮುಗುಳುನಗೆ 
ಕನಸಿನ ದಾರಿಯಲಿ ನಿನ್ನದೇ ದೀವಿಗೆ 

ನಿನ್ನ ಒಲವಾ ಕರೆಗೆ ಕೊಡುವೆ ಪೂರ್ತಿ ಸಮಯಾ 
ನನ್ನ ಕೊರಳಾ ಬಳಸಿ ಹೇಳು ಎಲ್ಲಾ ವಿಷಯಾ 

ನನ್ನಯ ಕೋಪ ನನ್ನಯ ತಾಳ್ಮೆ ಎಲ್ಲಾ ನಿನ್ನಯ ವಶವೇ ಗೆಳತಿ..

II ಕಾಯುವೆ ನಾನು II 
ಚರಣ: 2 (FEMALE)
ನೀನು ಹತ್ತಿರ.. ಇದ್ದರೂ.. ಹುಡುಕುವೆ ನಿನ್ನನೇ..
ಅಂತ ಪರಿ ಸೆಳೆತ ನೀನು ಇನಿಯ..

ನಿನ್ನ ಬದಲು, ಬೇರೇನು, ಸಿಕ್ಕರೂನು ಒಪ್ಪೆನೂ 
ನೀನೇ ನನ್ನ- ನಾಡಿಮಿಡಿತ ಗೆಳೆಯಾ..
M: ಕಡಲ ಅಲೆಯಾ ಹಾಗೆ, ನೀನು ನನ್ನ ಒಳಗೆ..
F: ರಾತ್ರಿ ಸುರಿದಾ ಮಳೆಯ ಸೊಬಗು ನೀನು ನನಗೆ
M: ನೋವಿಗೆ ಮದ್ದು- ನಿನ್ನಯ ಸ್ಪರ್ಶ.. ನಿನ್ನಾ ನೆನಪೇ ನನಗೆ ಹರುಷ 
F: ಸೋಲುವೆ ನಿನ್ನ- ಪ್ರೀತಿಯ ಮುಂದೆ, ಇಡದೆ ಯಾವ ಲೆಕ್ಕಾನೆ 
F: ದೇವರ ಮುಂದೆ- ಬೇಡುವೆ ನಾನು.. ಏಳೇಳು ಜನುಮ, ನಿನ್ನನ್ನೇ..
II ನಾನೇ II 
......................

snippet.title: Money Magnet : Kulwinder Sohi ft. J Hind | Deep Jandu | New Punjabi Song 2026 | Latest Punjabi Songs
snippet.description:
💸 Money Magnet | Kulwinder Sohi x J Hind
Leaf Records proudly presents the official music video for "Money Magnet," a high-octane anthem for the hustlers and go-getters.

Featuring the powerhouse vocals of Kulwinder Sohi and the legendary flow of J Hind, this track is backed by the signature heavy-hitting beats of Deep Jandu. Written by Husan Galwatti and brought to life through the cinematic lens of Nav Dhiman, "Money Magnet" is more than just a song—it’s a vibe.

🎵 Audio Credits
Singer: Kulwinder Sohi (Feat. J Hind)

Music: Deep Jandu

Lyrics: Husan Galwatti

Mixing & Mastering: Adam Fair

🎬 Video Credits
Director | DOP | Editor - Nav Dhiman
Line Production - Skypeace Production
Production Manager - AD Gill
Assistant Directors - Tejas Bir, Harji 
Production Coordinator - Gurnoor Riar
Stylist - Akshat Sharma
Makeup - Tanvir Kaur
Female Model - Princy Chahal
BTS - Ayush Seghal

Label: Leaf Records

Don't forget to Like, Comment, and Subscribe for more! #MoneyMagnet

SONG LYRICS:
MONEY MAGNET

AAYEA IK NUMBER DA SAADA ENNE LOT CH
NI PAATEY 2 NUMBERA WALE V BILLO SOCH CH
VEHLE SAALE MAGAZ KHPAAYI KRI JANDE AW NI GUESS LAUNDE KITTA INVEST STOCK CH
KEHLA MONEY MAGNET YOU KNOW WHAT I MEAN
REH BSS MITTRAN DE ISHQ CH LEEN
BEHKE MAAR CHILL NAALE DEKH PAISA GIRDA NI LOKI KEHNDE JATT NOTE CHAAPNI MACHINE
MANG KI AW MANGDI BABYYYYY
WHIP DSS BHAALDI AW KEHRIIIII
LA LA LA LA LA

AJJ DI GHARHI TA MENU SAAH DENDE NOTE
SUNDE AA MERI NA SLAAH DENDE NOTE
DUNIYA DI FIKR MUKA DENDE NOTE
TERE WAANGU AAKE DIL LAA DENDE NOTE
JANDE GINEY V NI EHO JE VAPAAR CH BAITHA’N
UTTRA JET CHO DOUBLE R CH BAITHA’N
KRA BUSINESS RUN MAI EMAAR CH BAITHA
LOKI SOCHDE K “HUSAN” HANKAAR CH BAITHA
JEHRE KL KRDE C RATING ON ME
DEKH LAATE LINE CH THEY WAITING ON ME
BEHKE MAAR CHILL NAALE DEKH PAISA GIRDA NI LOKI KEHNDE JATT NOTE CHAAPNI MACHINE
MANG KI AW MANGDI BABYYYYY
WHIP DSS BHAALDI AW KEHRIIIII
LAA LAA LAA LAA LAA

RAKHE KAMM TE DOLLAR IK CHAAR LAIKE AAVE
LOKI PAISA NE KMAUNDE PAISA MERE LYI KMAAVE
ES PAPER CH DUM JIVE GOLI CH POTAASH
MERE PUTTHEYA KAMMA NU HUN MILDI SABAASH

BODY KRA DETOX MEHNGI DEAL CHAKK KE
TU NAAL CHAL RAANIYA DI FEEL CHAK KE
MAI PAIRA CH VICHAADU TERE SAARI DUNIYA
TU LANGI CHLI HIKKA UTTTEY HEEL RAKH KE
GHUMIYE IBIZA FUCK OFF BALI THAILAND
TU MERI REH JIVE ONE MAN’S ISLAND
TERA MERA COMBO BNE WAHLA HYGIENE
ZINDGI NU DEKHAA LGGE VEGAS DA SCENE
BEHKE MAAR CHILL NAALE DEKH PAISA GIRDA NI LOKI KEHNDE JATT NOTE CHAAPNI MACHINE
MANG KI AW MANGDI BABYYYYY
WHIP DSS BHAALDI AW KEHRIIIII

snippet.title: Dhanda Nyoliwala - Paradox (Official Music Video)
snippet.description:
Here’s presenting the Twelfth and Final track from the album KOHRAM – Paradox, This track hits with a fearless, high-energy vibe — talking about being built different, thinking beyond limits, and standing far from the ordinary crowd. It’s made for those who move different and live on another level.' 🔥

・Please refrain from giving game instructions and advise until I asks for help.

Thank you very much for your support❣

━━━━━━━━━━━━✧❂✧━━━━━━━━━━━
है गुरुदेव प्रणाम आपके चरणों में,Nonstop Hey Gurudev Pranam,Lord Satsangi Bhajan,Nirgunsong,he gurudev pranam,he gurudev pranam aapke charno mein,हे गुरुदेव प्रणाम आपके चरणों में,hey gurudev pranam aapke charno mein,hey gurudev pranam apke charno,हे गुरुदेव प्रणाम,है गुरु ब्रह्मा है गुरु विष्णु,सारे तीरथ धाम,guruji bhajan hey gurudev pranam,he gurudev pranam aapke charno me,sare tirath dham aapke charno mein,hey gurudev pranam,saksham goel hey gurudev pranam song,Krish Bhakti,Hey Gurudev Pranam,सारे तीर्थ धाम आपके चरणों में,Saksham Goel,Latest Guruji Bhajan ,सारे तीरथ धाम आपके चरणों में,Hey_Gurudev_Pranam,Sare Tirth Dham Aapke Charno Mein,जनम के दाता मात पिता हैं,GuruBhajan,हे गुरुदेव प्रणाम आपके चरणो में,सारे तीर्थ धाम आपके चरणों में,Saksham Goel,निर्बल को बलवान बना दो,premanand ji maharaj,Premanand Govind Sharan Ji Maharaj,chetawani bhajan,chetawani bhajan hindi,chetawani bhajan rajasthani,nirgun bhajan hindi,chetawani bhajan,chetawani bhajan hindi,satsangi bhajan,bhajan,nirgun bhajan,chetawani bhajan 2025,chetawani bhajan new 2025,chetawani bhajan rajasthani,chetavani satsangi bhajan 2025,chetavani bhajan,rajasthani bhajan,2025 morning chetavani bhajans,nonstop chetavani bhajans 2025,nirgun bhajan hindi,nonstop nirgun satsangi bhajan,chetawani geet bhajan,chetawani,chetavni bhajan,new chetawani bhajan,ganga bhakti sagar,fatafat digital

━━━━━━━━━━━━✧❂✧━━━━━━━━━━━
सारे तीरथ धाम आपके चरणों में,
हे गुरुदेव प्रणाम आपके चरणो में,
ह्रदय में माँ गौरी लक्ष्मी, कंठ शारदा माता है,
जो भी मुख से वचन कहे वो, वचन सिद्ध हो जाता है,
है गुरु ब्रह्मा है गुरु विष्णु,
है शंकर भगवान् आपके चरणों में,
हे गुरुदेव प्रणाम आपके चरणों में,

जनम के दाता मात पिता हैं, आप करम के दाताहैं,
आप मिलाते है ईश्वर से, आप ही भाग्य विधाता हैं,
दुखियां मन को रोगी तन को,
मिलता है आराम आपके चरणों में,
हे गुरुदेव प्रणाम आपके चरणो में

निर्बल को बलवान बना दो, मूरख को गुणवान प्रभु,
देवकमल और बंशी को भी, ज्ञान का दो वरदान प्रभु,
हे महा दानी हे महा ज्ञानी,
रहूँ मैं सुबहो श्याम आपके चरणों में,
हे गुरुदेव प्रणाम आपके चरणों में,

करता करे न कर सके, पर गुरु करे सब होय,
सात द्वीप नौ खंड में, गुरु से बड़ा ना कोय,

मैं तो सात समुन्द्र की मसि करूँ, लेखनी सब बनराय,
सब धरती कागज़ करूँ,पर गुरु गुण लिखा ना जाए,
सारे तीरथ धाम आपके चरणों में,
हे गुरुदेव प्रणाम आपके चरणो में

━━━━━━━━━━━━✧❂✧━━━━━━━━━━━
